statement: In every magma, Equation 2421 (`x = (y * (z * (w * y))) * y`) implies Equation 3205 (`x = (((y * z) * y) * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0210
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w y))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) y) w) x)
